description: Hosting for static websites, JAMstack apps, and content delivery networks for fast global asset distribution.

entries.name: GitHub Pages
entries.summary: Free static site hosting directly from a GitHub repository, supports custom domains and Jekyll builds.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited public repos, 1GB site size soft limit, 100GB/month soft bandwidth limit.

entries.name: Cloudflare Pages
entries.summary: Static site and full-stack hosting on Cloudflare's edge network with unlimited bandwidth.
entries.freeTier: 500 builds/month, unlimited bandwidth, unlimited sites, 100 custom domains.

entries.name: Surge.sh
entries.summary: Command-line static web publishing tool — deploy a folder to a live URL in seconds.
entries.paidFrom: Pro adds custom domains and team features.

entries.name: Firebase Hosting
entries.summary: Fast, secure static and SSR hosting backed by Google's CDN, integrates with the rest of the Firebase suite.
entries.paidFrom: Pay-as-you-go on Blaze plan beyond free quota.

entries.name: jsDelivr
entries.summary: Free, fast CDN for npm, GitHub, and WordPress assets — widely used to serve JS/CSS libraries.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited free use for open-source/public package delivery.

entries.name: raw.githack.com
entries.summary: Serves raw files directly from GitHub/GitLab repos with correct Content-Type headers, backed by Cloudflare.
entries.freeTier: Free, unlimited use for public repo files.

entries.name: Statically
entries.summary: CDN for Git repos (GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket) plus WordPress asset and image optimization delivery.
entries.freeTier: Free CDN delivery with image transformation features.

entries.name: Bunny CDN
entries.summary: Affordable, low-latency CDN with edge storage and video streaming add-ons.
entries.freeTier: No perpetual free tier, but extremely low pay-as-you-go pricing from $0.01/GB.

entries.name: Fastly
entries.summary: Enterprise-grade edge cloud platform and CDN with programmable edge logic (Compute@Edge).
entries.freeTier: Free usage tier covers most small projects (free up to a monthly spend threshold).

entries.name: Render Static Sites
entries.summary: Free static site hosting with global CDN, automatic HTTPS, and Git-based deploys.
entries.freeTier: Unlimited free static sites with unlimited bandwidth.
